nodes.name: get-stats
nodes.notes: Basic auth header = base64(ADMIN_USERNAME:ADMIN_PASSWORD). Generate with: btoa('user:pass') in browser console, then set: Basic <result>

nodes.name: get-warm-leads
nodes.notes: Returns array of warm leads (open_count > 0, not replied/booked/unsubscribed). typeVersion 4.2 auto-splits array into items — use $input.all() in Code node.

nodes.name: build-email
nodes.notes: Merges stats + warm leads into subject + body_html. Uses $('get-stats').first().json for stats and $input.all() for warm leads.

nodes.name: send-digest
nodes.notes: IMPORTANT: emailFormat must be 'html' (not emailType). html field references $json.body_html from build-email node.
